---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability or enhancement for Nexus AI
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Summary
A clear, one-line description of the feature you're proposing.

## 🎯 Motivation & Use Case
Why is this feature valuable? What problem does it solve?

> *Example: "I want to add a Slack notification tool so Nexus can send briefings directly to a Slack channel instead of just email."*

## 🏗️ Proposed Implementation
If you have a technical idea, describe it here. Which agent/service/tool would this live in?

## 🔗 References
- Link to any relevant APIs, docs, or prior art.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
What does "done" look like for this feature? List the behaviors that must work.
- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...
